mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals near-term revenue strength for listed firms and improving household demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest value 511488.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of observations, or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses upward by more than 25 basis points over 3 months, higher discount rates reduce equity valuation multiples and generate negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest value 2.19 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered tightening episodes have higher mean 20-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered observations, or if the negative return hit rate is below 55% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment of more than 0.3 percentage point over 3 months signals weakening labor income and rising recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest value 3.7 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-triggered observations do not underperform non-triggered observations over 60 trading days, or if triggered 60-day returns are positive in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising CPI inflation combined with a rising federal funds rate identifies a policy-tightening inflation shock; higher input costs and discount rates jointly depress equities over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth > 3% and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest value 252.827 and FEDFUNDS latest value 2.19
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS trigger has no more negative effect than either variable alone, or if interaction-term return coefficient is not negative in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 6-month industrial production momentum signals expanding real output and better operating leverage for cyclical companies, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest value 108.4822 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO 6-month momentum is not associated with higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than negative momentum, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 across two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in housing starts below its 12-month average by more than 10% signals weakening credit-sensitive demand and future construction activity, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls > 10% below its 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest value 1201.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside-triggered observations have non-negative average 60-day S&P 500 excess returns versus baseline, or if the negative return hit rate is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous positive payroll growth and positive retail sales growth indicate labor income translating into spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through near-term earnings sentiment.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS and RSAFS both post positive 3-month growth
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest value 149750.0 and RSAFS latest value 511488.0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive PAYEMS and RSAFS signal does not outperform single-series signals over 5 trading days, or if average triggered return is not positive in walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: Strong real GDP growth paired with a rising federal funds rate signals an overheating expansion in which policy restraint offsets growth benefits, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 2-quarter growth > 2% annualized and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest value 18671.497 and FEDFUNDS latest value 2.19
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the GDPC1-FEDFUNDS interaction coefficient is not negative in rolling regressions.
